creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since you seem to be the repo owner, please consider to generate release archives.
See: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-master_sites-github

...and in it's current form, follow "Example 16. Use of USE_GITHUB with DISTVERSIONPREFIX"

Add LICENSE_FILE

${CP} --> https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#install-copytree

Best regards,
Daniel
